# Launch Draft: ObviousBench: Where Obvious Tasks Still Break Language Models

ObviousBench v0.1 is a frozen benchmark snapshot for questions that
should be easy but still expose brittle behavior in model settings.

The launch should point readers to the canonical project page, static
report, dataset card, GitHub release, DOI, and arXiv paper once live.

## Caveats

- Do not mix this snapshot with the older 234-row, 80-question paper draft.
- Do not present reported Anthropic reasoning tokens as billed hidden-thinking cost.
- Do not claim a measured human baseline for v0.1; no human baseline is planned for this release.
